global_prompt_prefix: Vertical 9:16 cinematic character design sheet, 941x1672 style ratio, grounded eastern epic fantasy, realistic fabric texture, restrained low-magic, neutral dark studio backdrop, multiple views on one sheet, no readable text labels, no modern objects, no neon, no xianxia glamour.
global_negative_prompt: ragged beggar clothing, shredded hems, dangling torn strips, identical generic refugee outfits, modern clothing, polished heroic armor for civilians, overpowered magic, full angel wings, separated side-by-side sun and moon icons, plain black sun without abstract white-wing coverage, literal realistic insect wing flag, visible old-imperial insignia on Yan Nanzhi exile clothing, human hair or real human face for Bai Yi, obvious waist cloth Sun-Moon insignia for Xue Linqiang, cartoon style, game UI text, watermark

zhaoming.rule: moon-white crescent must sit inside a worn golden sun wheel as one fused badge

suming.rule: abstract white wings cover a black sun with cold halo; old moon mark erased

prompts.purpose: refine protagonist hunter costume and v3 Zhaoming token integration
prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang, clearly 17-year-old common hunter and old relay guide, youthful sharp face, sword-like eyebrows, clear guarded eyes, lean wiry body. Clothing is poor but intact: gray-brown coarse hemp hunter short layers, reinforced shoulder and elbow patches, stitched repairs, leather wrist guards, practical short boots, quiver strap, trap cord, route pouch, no shredded hems, no beggar rags. Include hunter bow and short knife. Show a close-up inset of the half broken old relay token naturally built into the sheet: worn bronze and old white stone, one fused Zhaoming Sun-Moon emblem with moon-white crescent inside worn golden sun wheel, broken across the seal, not separate sun and moon. Include subtle left shoulder injury and faint gold-red residual marks only at eye corner or shoulder blade. Front, side, three-quarter, full-body and prop close-up, same identity across views.

prompts.purpose: create concealed exile wardrobe plus old-imperial formal wardrobe reference
prompts.prompt: Yan Nanzhi, 18-year-old female exiled royal princess, calm high-cold royal composure, slim figure, upright court-trained posture. Show two costume states on the sheet. State one: concealed exile clothing in mist purple, dark violet or cold gray coarse cloth, clean, orderly, intact, restrained, with no visible old-imperial insignia on the exterior, no rags, no holes, no shredded hem. Hidden props are shown only as close-up insets: moon-white jade concealed in an inner pocket, oil-paper blood treaty fragments, red hair cord inner knot, tiny under-collar secret stitch. State two: vivid old-imperial formal memory/reveal outfit inspired by Chinese Ming-style Hanfu: vermilion wide sleeves, peacock blue or jewel-blue inner layer, moon-white middle garment, purple-crimson accent, woven gold court pattern, ordered skirt lines, luxurious but carrying old-imperial cracks and debt. Black hair tied with southern red cord, unmistakably female, royal bearing without active-exile crown. Front, side, three-quarter, full body, face close-up, hidden-prop close-up, formal-cloth detail close-up.

prompts.purpose: keep v01 insectoid Qingming inspector design and only correct the v3 Sumin insignia
prompts.prompt: Bai Yi, Sumin insectoid Qingming register inspector, based on the v01 design direction: tall still vertical silhouette, spotless white official robe, translucent wing-membrane shoulder mantle, integrated pale chitin faceplate, large dark compound-eye structures, dark neck membrane, slightly jointed or carapace-like fingers. He is an insectoid ruler-form that can only disguise as a human ruler; do not show human hair, real human face, skin texture, or ordinary masked-human styling. Any hair-like shape must be cylindrical Qingming crown, false-hair-like chitin ornament, head casing, or shell crest. Keep the cold controlled bureaucratic menace and clean ritual stillness. Correct the insignia naturally on robe, register, and detail close-up: abstract white wings covering a black sun disk with cold white or dark-gray halo, old moon trace erased, not a plain black sun and not literal insect wings. Include insect-wax needle, Qingming white register, clean cloth for wiping needle, thin white incense trace. Insectoid official, not full beast monster, no black armor. Front, side, back, human-ruler-disguise pose, inspection pose, face/compound-eye close-up, wing-membrane close-up and v3 insignia/detail close-up.

prompts.purpose: replace ragged child clothing with distinct village child and Qingming identifier states
prompts.prompt: Shen Zhaomian child character sheet with two states. Village state: sensitive child face, simple tied hair and burned hair cord, intact patched child short jacket, small apron or tied overskirt for medicine-house helping, small herb pouch, simple cloth shoes, poor and dusty but not ragged, no shredded skirt. Qingming identifier state: clean white child robe, insect-wax wrist ring, restrained v3 Sumin identifier mark with abstract white wings over haloed black sun, childhood herb pouch or burned hair cord retained as anchor. Institutional trauma, not villain glamour. Show front and side for both states, plus herb pouch, burned hair cord and wrist ring close-ups.

prompts.purpose: differentiate wallfoot mixed-heritage clothing from generic poor refugee clothing
prompts.prompt: Lu Qingli, teenage wallfoot mixed-heritage girl, compact fast survivor, wary half-smile, always ready to move near walls. Clothing is distinct wallfoot market survival wear: intact gray-blue short jacket, patched underlayers, rope belt, hidden pocket seams, black-market utility loops, kiln-dust cuffs, shard pottery charm, dark wood pass, narrow hidden knife. Poor, dusty and repaired but not ragged, not shredded, not a hunter outfit. Subtle insect-scale trace behind ear only visible in close-up, no decorative fantasy beast features. Front, side, back, action crouch with knife, ear-scale close-up and charm/pass close-up.

prompts.purpose: refine border-wall old soldier clothing and move old Sun-Moon mark to ancestral armor
prompts.prompt: Xue Linqiang, older border-wall master and Gray Wall Army realist, broad worn old soldier posture, wind-burned face, frost-cracked fingers. Clothing is border military household gear: intact patched padded undercoat, ancestral gray-stone old armor plates, coarse wall cloth scarf, repaired cold-weather layers, old iron fasteners, snow wraps, practical boots, field-repaired but not ragged and not clean imperial officer. Include bone whistle, worn long spear, old wall belt. The old Zhaoming fused Sun-Moon mark must be on ancestral armor only: nearly erased physical imprint on breastplate or inner shoulder plate, half worn golden sun wheel and cracked moon-white crescent scar, damaged by rust, snow, blade cuts and time. Do not put the emblem on a waist cloth or obvious banner. Front, side, back, wall guard pose, bone whistle close-up and worn ancestral armor emblem close-up.

prompts.purpose: single board proving P1 human clothing roles are visually distinct
prompts.prompt: P1 costume role differentiation board for Severed Homeland, six full-body simplified costume references plus one inset row of alternate states, no text labels. Show distinct silhouettes and accessories: common hunter boy with gray-brown short layers, bow, leather wrist guards, trap cord and route pouch; exiled royal princess in concealed mist-purple/cold-gray travel robe with hidden jade and treaty props, no visible old-imperial insignia; inset of her vivid old-imperial Ming-style Hanfu formal state with vermilion, peacock blue, moon white and woven gold; Qingming insectoid inspector in spotless white official robe with no human hair, abstract white-wing-over-haloed-black-sun insignia, needle and register; village child in intact patched short jacket, small apron and herb pouch; wallfoot mixed-heritage girl in gray-blue short jacket, hidden pockets, wood pass, pottery charm and narrow knife; border old soldier in padded undercoat, ancestral old armor plates, bone whistle, spear, snow wraps and nearly erased old Sun-Moon imprint on armor. All poor/common clothes may be patched and dusty but not ragged or shredded. The costumes must be distinguishable by profession at a glance.

blocked.reason: Ready for built-in image generation or Codex background thread generation.
